code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [CloudNative_DockerImage] --> Initializing: start_link(CloudNative_Serverless)

    state Initializing {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [CloudNative_ServiceMesh]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(CloudNative_Serverless)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [CloudNative_Serverless]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [CloudNative_Serverless]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(CloudNative_HelmChart)

    %% Session Restoration (CloudNative_Serverless)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [CloudNative_ServiceMesh]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {CloudNative_Serverless] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [CloudNative_DockerImage]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(CloudNative_HelmChart)
        - subscriptions: map(CloudNative_HelmChart)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{CloudNative_K8sCluster}
        - last_activity: timestamp(CloudNative_HelmChart)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(CloudNative_HelmChart)
    IdleTimeout --> [CloudNative_DockerImage]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {CloudNative_Serverless] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {CloudNative_HelmChart] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [CloudNative_Serverless]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {CloudNative_ServiceMesh}
        - Fastest: O(CloudNative_Serverless) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {CloudNative_HelmChart}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {CloudNative_HelmChart}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为云原生MCP会话管理设计一个完整的状态机。核心是从Docker镜像启动，经过初始化最终到达Connected状态，然后处理各种运行时场景。
明白。初始化阶段需要包含哪些具体步骤？我看到有K8s集群配置加载、传输层初始化这些环节。
对，初始化是个复合状态。从K8s集群加载配置，初始化传输层，建立连接，发送初始化消息，等待服务网格确认。完成后才进入Connected。
好的，Initializing复合状态已画出，包含LoadConfig到InitTransport到EstablishConnection到SendInitialize到WaitForInitialized的链条，最终连到ServiceMesh。
确认。初始化完成后收到initialized消息就进入Connected状态。Connected也是复合状态，包含Active和三个操作子状态。
三个操作子状态都连回Active，这是说操作完成后回到活跃状态？另外Subscribing也是Connected的一部分吗？
是的，操作完成后返回Active。Subscribing是独立流程——从Active发起订阅，进入Subscribing复合状态，确认后返回Active。
Connected复合状态已完善，包含Active以及ResourceOperations、ToolOperations、PromptOperations的循环，还有Subscribing分支。
现在需要处理连接生命周期。Connected可以暂停、重连或关闭。暂停和恢复是双向的。
Connected到Paused的双向转换已添加。重连场景呢？
传输错误触发Reconnecting，成功则回Connected，失败则进入Failed状态。Reconnecting本身也是复合状态，包含退避重试逻辑。
重试逻辑具体怎么设计？有最大重试次数检查吗？
Reconnecting内部：从K8s集群开始，进入Backoff，然后ReconnectAttempt。成功到Success连回Serverless，失败则IncrementRetryCount，检查上限，未超限回Backoff，超限则失败。
Reconnecting复合状态已完成，包含完整的退避重试循环和最大重试检查。
两种关闭方式：GracefulShutdown是正常通知，AbnormalShutdown是严重错误。都需要清理回K8s集群或Docker镜像。
GracefulShutdown的具体流程是？需要持久化会话吗？
GracefulShutdown是复合状态：从Serverless开始，先UnsubscribeResources，DrainPendingRequests，CloseTransport，然后PersistSession，最后TerminateProcess回到Docker镜像。
GracefulShutdown复合状态已添加，包含完整的优雅关闭流程。AbnormalShutdown呢？
AbnormalShutdown从Docker镜像开始：LogError，PersistCrashDump，NotifyDependents，TerminateProcess，最后回到K8s集群。这是异常终止的清理路径。
AbnormalShutdown复合状态已完成。现在补充Subscribing的内部细节？
Subscribing从ServiceMesh开始：RegisterSubscription，SetupWatcher，ConfirmSubscription，然后回到ServiceMesh。这是订阅确认的标准流程。
Subscribing复合状态已完善。需要添加会话持久化的注释说明吗？
在Connected右侧加注释，说明三种后端：ETS内存型、DETS磁盘型、Mnesia集群型。这影响会话恢复策略。
Connected右侧的Session Persistence注释已添加。还需要其他注释吗？
在Reconnecting右侧加Failover Modes注释：本地重启、Mnesia副本、DETS恢复。还有Restoration Priority注释。
Reconnecting右侧的两条注释已添加：Failover Modes和Restoration Priority。
添加会话验证流程。Connected可以进入SessionValidation进行健康检查，健康则保持，不健康则失败到HelmChart。
SessionValidation转换已添加：Connected双向healthy，或到Failed(unhealthy)。
还需要IdleTimeout机制。长时间无活动从Connected进入IdleTimeout，会话过期后回到Docker镜像。
IdleTimeout转换已添加。速率限制也需要吗？
是的，RateLimited状态。请求速率超限进入，退避完成回Connected，持续超限则失败。
RateLimited状态及转换已添加。ResourceOperations的内部需要细化吗？
ResourceOperations是复合状态：从Serverless开始Watching，资源变化时NotificationReceived，然后DeliverNotification，循环回Watching。
ResourceOperations复合状态已完成，包含资源监听生命周期。ToolOperations呢？
ToolOperations从HelmChart开始：Executing，长操作进入InProgress，可发送ProgressUpdate，完成后到Complete回到Serverless。
ToolOperations复合状态已添加，包含工具执行和进度更新循环。
在Initializing左侧加Backend Selection注释，对比ServiceMesh、HelmChart、HelmChart三种选择的特性。
Initializing左侧的Backend Selection注释已添加，对比了速度、持久性和CAP权衡。
补充健康检查状态。Connected进入HealthCheck，全部正常保持，子系统失败进入Degraded，恢复完成回Connected，恢复失败则失败。
HealthCheck和Degraded状态及转换已添加。Connected右侧还需要会话状态字段的详细注释吗？
是的，在Connected右侧下方加Session State注释，列出session_id、transport_pid、pending_requests、subscriptions、capabilities、last_activity、backend等字段及其类型。
Connected右侧下方的Session State详细注释已添加，包含所有字段类型信息。
检查一下，Initializing的起始应该是从DockerImage通过start_link到Serverless触发的，这个转换有吗？
确认，DockerImage到Initializing的转换已标注为start_link(Serverless)。整个状态机结构完整了。
确认。这个状态机覆盖了云原生MCP会话的完整生命周期：初始化、活跃操作、暂停、重连、优雅关闭、异常处理，以及会话持久化和健康监控。
状态图已完成，包含5个主复合状态、多个子状态复合体、7条注释说明，完整实现了云原生Serverless会话管理的状态机设计。
